title: CBM Technician
description:
Purpose of Role

Develop, operate and manage Condition Monitoring techniques such as Vibration Monitoring, Thermography and Ultra sound monitoring for customers in Singapore.

Key Activities

  • To develop and operate condition monitoring programs for John Crane customers in
  • Chemical, Petrochemical and Oil & Gas environments in conjunction with lead
  • Condition Monitoring / Reliability Engineer.
  • To set up and optimize vibration monitoring route for rotating equipment's in the plant as necessary.
  • To collect routine and ad-hoc vibration data from equipment's as per schedule.
  • To analyze vibration data, report abnormalities and provide recommendations
  • To implement other condition monitoring solutions such as Thermography, Ultra Sound Monitoring and Motion Amplification.
  • Conduct monthly (Alliance Improvement team)/quarterly/ yearly meeting with stakeholders
  • Prepare monthly and yearly reports for external stakeholders.

Key Accountabilities

  • Maintain the equipment & vibration database and failure history using SKF Aptitude or AMS Machinery Manager software within the scope of the contract.
  • Perform vibration analysis, recommendations, and reporting.
  • Monitor key KPI’s on periodic basis
  • Understand customers’ needs, Review installations, make engineering proposals to optimize arrangements, quantify benefits, prepare and present proposals

Skills & Experience

Education:

  • ITE or Diploma in Mechanical in Engineering or Similar

Experience:

  • 2-8 Years

Technical Skills:

  • Posses knowledge of rotating equipment's used in
  • Oil & Gas, Petrochemical or process industries
  • Able to collect vibration data using portable vibration analyzers such as Emerson 2140 or SKF
  • Vibration Analyst certification on category 1 or 2 preferred
  • Exposure to Condition Monitoring techniques such as Ultra- Sound Analysis, Motion Amplification will be added advantage.
  • People Skills
  • Self-driven & Result Oriented
  • Problem solving

Interested candidate please send your application and resume to: vidya.krishnamurthy@johncrane.com

postedCompany.description:
JOHN CRANE SINGAPORE PTE LTD

John Crane is a world-leading provider of engineered products and services for the major process industries. These include the oil and gas, power generation, chemical, pharmaceutical, pulp and paper, and mining sectors.

Delivering engineered solutions that keep process plants running, John Crane enhances customer productivity by providing advanced technology industrial products and performance-enhancing sevices backed by an exceptional global network.
